headline: THE PERSON BEHIND THE LICENCE
subheading: Why the GDP Responsible Person makes or breaks your wholesale dealer's authorisation at inspection
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial visualisation of accountable oversight across a pharmaceutical distribution chain, centred on a single luminous teal node of authority connected by clean glowing lines to a flowing network of supply-chain pathways, sealed temperature-controlled shipping forms and a softly pulsing monitoring waveform. A subtle cyan checkmark-shaped light and an unbroken cold-chain gradient ribbon thread through receding geometric distribution shelving rendered as elegant minimalist planes. Deep navy background with layered depth, illuminated by teal and cyan signal glows and a faint subtle green confidence accent suggesting verification and integrity.
